interfaces.name: getHomepageContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage hero content and summaries of main boat insurance offerings and key actions.

primaryCtaLabel.description: Label for main 'get a quote' call to action

targetPageKey.description: Front-end route key, not a URL

interfaces.name: startNewQuote
interfaces.description: Initialize a new boat insurance quote with optional policy type and discount context. Sets this quote as the active quote for the current user.

parameters.name: entrySource
parameters.description: Where the quote was started. e.g., 'homepage_cta', 'discounts_page', 'coverage_overview_page', 'policy_type_detail_page', 'policy_comparison_page'

parameters.name: policyTypeId
parameters.description: Optional default policy type to preselect for this quote.

parameters.name: preselectedDiscountCodes
parameters.description: Optional discounts to pre-flag as potentially applicable. e.g., 'boating_safety_course', 'multi_policy'

step.description: Initial step for the quote wizard. e.g., 'boat_details'

interfaces.name: getQuoteBoatDetailsFormConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration and any prefilled values for the boat details step of the quote wizard.

maxOnlineBoatLengthFeet.description: Maximum boat length allowed for online quotes, surfaced from eligibility rules.

interfaces.name: updateQuoteBoatDetails
interfaces.description: Create or update the active quote's boat details, validating online eligibility (length, value, etc.).

interfaces.name: getQuoteCoverageOptions
interfaces.description: Get coverage options (liability limits, deductibles, policy types, discounts) for the active quote.

interfaces.name: updateQuoteCoverageSelections
interfaces.description: Update liability limit, deductible, optional policy type, and discount eligibility for the active quote. Used from the coverage options step, including 'View Plans' action.

parameters.name: policyTypeId
parameters.description: Optional change of policy type on coverage step.

nextStep.description: Suggested next step, e.g., 'plans_list' after clicking 'View Plans'.

interfaces.name: getQuotePlans
interfaces.description: List available plans for the active quote, with sorting to find cheapest or best coverage.

totalPriceMonthly.description: After discounts and selected options (if any)

interfaces.name: selectPlanForCurrentQuote
interfaces.description: Select a specific plan for the active quote from the plans list.

interfaces.name: getSelectedPlanSummaryAndOptions
interfaces.description: Get the selected plan’s summary and all configurable optional coverages for the active quote.

interfaces.name: updateQuoteOptionalCoverage
interfaces.description: Toggle or adjust a specific optional coverage within the active quote and return updated pricing.

interfaces.name: setQuoteBillingFrequency
interfaces.description: Set billing frequency (monthly or annually) for the active quote and return updated premium amounts.

interfaces.name: saveCurrentQuote
interfaces.description: Save the active quote with a custom label and return confirmation with reference number.

interfaces.name: resumeQuote
interfaces.description: Resume a previously saved quote and set it as the active quote.

interfaces.name: beginApplicantInfoForCurrentQuote
interfaces.description: Advance the active quote into the applicant information step and return required fields.

interfaces.name: login
interfaces.description: Authenticate a customer (demo credentials supported) and initialize access to account dashboard and policies.

interfaces.name: getAccountDashboardSummary
interfaces.description: Get an overview of the signed-in user's policies and saved quotes for the account dashboard.

policyId.description: Policy id, typically same as policyNumber

nextPaymentDueDate.description: ISO date or empty string when not applicable

interfaces.name: getPolicyDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific policy, including mailing address and available sections.

interfaces.name: updatePolicyMailingAddress
interfaces.description: Update mailing address fields for a specific policy and return the updated address.

interfaces.name: getPolicyDocuments
interfaces.description: List documents associated with a policy, optionally filtered by type (e.g., ID cards).

interfaces.name: getPolicyIdCard
interfaces.description: Get the current digital ID card for a policy for inline viewing.

viewUrl.description: Internal URL or identifier for rendering in an embedded viewer.

htmlContent.description: Optional pre-rendered HTML for inline display when format is 'html'.

interfaces.name: getClaimStartOptions
interfaces.description: Get available claim types and guidance text for the claim start page.

interfaces.name: startBoatClaim
interfaces.description: Start a new boat insurance claim from the claim start page using a policy number. Sets this as the active claim.

claimId.description: Internal claim identifier for debugging; subsequent form steps use the active claim implicitly.

interfaces.name: getCurrentClaimFormState
interfaces.description: Get the current active claim form state for multi-step claim entry (incident, owner, description, review).

interfaces.name: updateCurrentClaimIncidentDetails
interfaces.description: Update incident details for the active claim.

interfaces.name: updateCurrentClaimOwnerDetails
interfaces.description: Update owner contact details for the active claim.

interfaces.name: updateCurrentClaimIncidentDescription
interfaces.description: Update the free-text incident description for the active claim.

interfaces.name: getCurrentClaimReviewSummary
interfaces.description: Get a complete summary of the active claim for the review step before submission.

interfaces.name: submitCurrentClaim
interfaces.description: Submit the active claim and return confirmation with claim number.

interfaces.name: searchAgents
interfaces.description: Search for local agents near a ZIP code with radius and sorting options.

interfaces.name: getAgentDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific local agent, including contact info and office address.

bio.description: Optional descriptive text about the agent

interfaces.name: submitAgentConsultationRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a consultation or contact request message to a specific agent.

interfaces.name: getCoverageOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview content for boat insurance coverage, including core coverages and policy type summaries.

interfaces.name: getPolicyComparison
interfaces.description: Get a comparison table of policy types and features, with support for highlighting selected features like towing and uninsured boater coverage.

parameters.name: highlightFeatureCodes
parameters.description: Feature codes to highlight or filter. e.g., 'on_water_towing', 'uninsured_boater_coverage'

parameters.name: requireAllHighlightedFeatures
parameters.description: If true, marks policy types that include all highlighted features.

recommendedPolicyTypeId.description: Lowest relativePriceRank among policy types that meet highlighted criteria, if any.

interfaces.name: getPolicyTypeDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a single policy type, including allowed liability limits and optional coverages.

interfaces.name: startQuoteForPolicyType
interfaces.description: Start a new quote from a policy type detail or comparison page, optionally preselecting a liability limit.

interfaces.name: getDiscountsOverview
interfaces.description: Get an overview of available discounts and their key eligibility information.

interfaces.name: getDiscountDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific discount, including eligibility and how to apply it.

interfaces.name: updateQuoteDiscountEligibility
interfaces.description: Apply or remove discount eligibility flags for the active quote and return updated pricing.

interfaces.name: getHelpCenterOverview
interfaces.description: Get help center landing content and categorized featured articles.

interfaces.name: searchHelpArticles
interfaces.description: Search help center / FAQ articles by query string.

interfaces.name: getHelpArticleBySlug
interfaces.description: Get full content for a help article identified by slug, including any eligibility metadata like maximum boat length.

maxOnlineQuoteBoatLengthFeet.description: Present when article defines eligibility for online quotes; null or omitted otherwise.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateActiveQuote
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or create the active Quote for the current user context, stored in local or server-side state.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateQuotePremiums
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate base and total premiums for a quote when coverages, discounts, or optional coverages change.

helperFunctions.name: _validateBoatEligibility
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that checks boat length, value, and other attributes against online eligibility rules (including max length from HelpArticle).

helperFunctions.name: _getActiveClaim
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch the current in-progress Claim for the user, if any.

helperFunctions.name: _updateClaimStep
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to update the active claim's step state when form sections are completed.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateAgentDistances
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute distances between a search ZIP and agent office coordinates for agent search results.
